FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class AppBarButton

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI AppBarButton (AppBarButton_themeresources.xaml). Three layout families:

<ul><li><b>FullSize</b> (default style): a 68-wide (:133 Width=68), 64-min-high (AppBarThemeMinHeight,
CommandBar_themeresources.xaml:71) vertical stack — 16px icon (AppBarButtonContentHeight) over a 12px Caption
label.</li><li><b>Compact</b> (<code>isCompact: true</code> — the closed CommandBar): the label collapses; icon-only at the 48px
compact height (AppBarThemeCompactHeight :72), ContentViewboxCompactMargin 0,12,0,12 (:111).</li><li><b>Overflow</b> (<xref href="FluentGpu.Controls.AppBarButton.CreateOverflow(FluentGpu.Controls.AppBarCommand%2cSystem.Boolean%2cSystem.Boolean%2cSystem.Action%2cFluentGpu.Controls.AppBarButton.Style)" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> — the CommandBar overflow menu): a HORIZONTAL row — optional
toggle-check column, optional 16×16 icon at the left (OverflowWithMenuIcons :211-223), the label as a 14px Body run
(OverflowTextLabel, padding 0,5,0,8 = AppBarButtonOverflowTextLabelPadding :114; lead margin 12 / 38 with toggles /
76 with toggles+icons :192-238), and right-aligned 12px accelerator text (KeyboardAcceleratorTextLabel Margin
24,0,12,0 :371).</li></ul>

State fills are the subtle ramp (AppBarButtonBackground/​PointerOver/​Pressed = SubtleFill Transparent/Secondary/
Tertiary); press dims the foreground to TextSecondary. FocusVisualMargin = −3 (:135). A
<xref href="FluentGpu.Foundation.KeyAccelerator" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> chord invokes the button from anywhere (WinUI KeyboardAccelerator).

public static class AppBarButton

Property Value

AppBarButton.Style

Methods

Create(string, string, Action, bool, Style?, bool, KeyAccelerator?)

FullSize (labeled, 68×64) or Compact (icon-only, 48×48) AppBarButton. accelerator wires a real engine keyboard-accelerator chord onto the click.

public static BoxEl Create(string glyph, string label, Action onClick, bool enabled = true, AppBarButton.Style? style = null, bool isCompact = false, KeyAccelerator? accelerator = null)

Parameters

glyph string
label string
onClick Action
enabled bool
style AppBarButton.Style
isCompact bool
accelerator KeyAccelerator?

Returns

BoxEl

CreateOverflow(AppBarCommand, bool, bool, Action, Style?)

An Overflow-state AppBarButton row for the CommandBar overflow menu (AppBarButton_themeresources.xaml :192-238 Overflow/OverflowWithToggleButtons/OverflowWithMenuIcons/OverflowWithToggleButtonsAndMenuIcons): [check column when hasToggles] [16×16 icon at left when hasIcons] label (Body 14, padding 0,5,0,8) … right-aligned accelerator text (Caption 12, margin 24,0,12,0).

public static BoxEl CreateOverflow(AppBarCommand cmd, bool hasToggles, bool hasIcons, Action onInvoke, AppBarButton.Style? style = null)

Parameters

cmd AppBarCommand
hasToggles bool
hasIcons bool
onInvoke Action
style AppBarButton.Style

Returns

BoxEl
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
